daily_summary.headline: Aurora and Routine Launches Mark the Day

top_events.title: G1 Aurora Storm
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected, offering aurora viewing opportunities for high-latitude observers.
top_events.action: Check for clear skies if you're above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 is set to launch another batch of Starlink satellites, continuing its mission to expand global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: Smart Dragon 3 Launch
top_events.description: China's Smart Dragon 3 is scheduled to launch with an unknown payload, marking another step in commercial space activities.
top_events.action: Follow updates for potential insights on the payload.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
